step1.title: Name your company
step1.description: This is the organization your agents will work for.
step1.missionPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

step2.title: Create your first agent
step2.description: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
step2.adapterEnvCheckDesc: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
step2.claudeAnthropicKeyWarning: Claude failed while <mono>ANTHROPIC_API_KEY</mono> is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.
step2.ifAuthFails: If auth fails, set <mono>{{envVar}}</mono> in env or run <mono>{{loginCmd}}</mono>.
step2.ifLoginRequired: If login is required, run <mono>claude login</mono> and retry.

step3.title: Give it something to do
step3.description: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
step3.taskDescriptionPlaceholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...

step4.title: Ready to launch
step4.description: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

errors.createCompanyFirst: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
errors.openCodeModelRequired: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
errors.openCodeModelsLoading: OpenCode models are still loading. Please wait and try again.
errors.noOpenCodeModels: No OpenCode models discovered. Run `opencode models` and authenticate providers.
errors.retriedUnsetStillFailing: Retried with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
errors.unsetAnthropicFailed: Failed to unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and retry.
